conditions.message: The payload touches contact-policy guidance, which is a permission surface, but it scopes openness to expected session participants and does not introduce code, secrets, PII, tenant, sandbox, or external API changes.
evidence: The ORCHESTRATOR Contact Mesh section says to pre-approve the expected communication mesh, with workers to orchestrator and implementers/verifiers able to message each other when verifier packets will be relayed.

The Agent Mail reference says to open or pre-approve the contact mesh the session is expected to use and lists concrete intended directions: workers to orchestrator, implementer to verifiers and reverse, verifiers to orchestrator.
The text recommends set_contact_policy open only when broad session contact is intended, and keeps contact approval distinct from verifier evidence.

The staged diff adds only markdown template guidance and string-contract tests; it does not alter Agent Mail implementation, authentication, secrets, PII handling, sandboxing, or external API behavior.
